utterances.speaker: Doug
utterances.text: Bing ! We are all set for tonight , 8 o clock .

emotion_cause.span: 1_We are all set for tonight , 8 o clock .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Oh uh , as it turns out , we can not do it . Monica has to work .

emotion_cause.span: 2_we can not do it . Monica has to work .

utterances.speaker: Doug
utterances.text: Oh , my ex ... wife did not work , unless you call turning into her mother work . Fine . Tomorrow night then .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Oh uh well tomorrow no good for her either .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: It is the semi ... finals ... of her ... botchy ball tournament .

utterances.speaker: Doug
utterances.text: What going on Bing ? Does uh , your wife have a problem with me or something ?

emotion_cause.span: 7_Does uh , your wife have a problem with me or something ?

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Well now ... now you are just talking crazy .

utterances.speaker: Doug
utterances.text: So why can not the three of us go out together ?

emotion_cause.span: 9_why can not the three of us go out together ?

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Because uh ... we ... we ... we split up . Monica and I split up . Hold me .

emotion_cause.span: 10_we split up . Monica and I split up .

utterances.speaker: Doug
utterances.text: Good God Bing I ... well I can not say I am altogether surprised , I saw the way she looked at you , and there was no love there .

emotion_cause.span: 11_I saw the way she looked at you , and there was no love there .

utterances.speaker: Doug
utterances.text: And the way she looked at me , pure lust .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: You know what would really help me through this tough time is choking something . Can I choke you ?

emotion_cause.span: 12_And the way she looked at me , pure lust .

utterances.speaker: Doug
utterances.text: Bing my boy , we are gonna get you over this .

utterances.speaker: Doug
utterances.text: Now here is the plan , grab your coat , we are going to a strip club .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Oh no ... no ... no , Monica would freak . But to hell with that bitch .
